message:
Add admin token auth UI and improve budget alert parsing

Admin metadata page improvements:
- Add admin token input field with session storage persistence
- Send x-jfp-admin-token and x-jfp-admin-role headers with all requests
- Add persistence status card showing file path and errors
- Display Shield icon for persistence indicator
- Clear token button for easy logout
- Token persisted in sessionStorage (browser session only)

CLI registry improvements:
- Add isBudgetAlertRecord type guard for safer parsing
- Iterate from end of file to find last valid budget alert
- Skip malformed JSON entries instead of crashing
- Better handling of corrupted budget alert files

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
